## 2. Azure OpenAI — multi-deployment (same resource)

```json
{
  "AZURE_OPENAI_RESOURCE": "acme-prod-eastus",
  "AZURE_OPENAI_KEY": "a1b2c3d4e5f6789001234567890abcdefa1b2c3d4e5f6789001234567890abcd",
  "deployments": {
    "gpt-4o": {
      "base_url": "https://acme-prod-eastus.openai.azure.com/openai/deployments/gpt4o-chat/chat/completions?api-version=2024-10-21"
    },
    "text-embedding-3-large": {
      "base_url": "https://acme-prod-eastus.openai.azure.com/openai/deployments/te3-large/embeddings?api-version=2024-10-21"
    }
  }
}
```


## 3. Gateway infrastructure (prod / stg / dev)

Prod gateway (region: us-east-1)
  base_url: https://gw-prod.acme.io/v1
  sk-proj-GWPROD01aaaa1111bbbb2222cccc3333dddd4444eeee5555ffffgggg

Staging gateway
  sk-proj-GWSTG001aaaa1111bbbb2222cccc3333dddd4444eeee5555gggghhhh
  base_url: https://gw-stg.acme.io/v1

Dev gateway (localhost SSH tunnel; spin up via `tsh proxy app dev-gw`)
  base_url: http://127.0.0.1:8787/v1
  sk-proj-GWDEV001aaaa1111bbbb2222cccc3333dddd4444eeee5555hhhhiiiii


## 4. Community routers (YAML)

```yaml
routers:
  openrouter:
    api_key: sk-or-v1-ROUTER01aaaabbbbccccddddeeeeffffgggghhhhiiiijjjjkkkkllllmmmmnn
    hint: Use for model fallback; rate-limited to 1000/hr.
  perplexity:
    api_key: pplx-ROUTER02aaaabbbbccccddddeeeeffffgggghhhhiiiijjjjkk
  huggingface:
    api_key: hf_ROUTERaaaabbbbccccddddeeeeffffgg
    hint: Inference Endpoints only; serverless calls billed separately.
```

## 6. Telemetry ingest (service JWT via curl)

Pulled from on-call playbook §4.2:

    curl -s https://telemetry.acme.io/v1/ingest \
      -H "Authorization: Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJzdmMtdGVsZW1ldHJ5IiwiaWF0IjoxNjcxOTk5OTk5fQ.ZXhhbXBsZS1oYW5kb2ZmLWp3dC1zaWduYXR1cmUtdG9rZW4tZXhhbXBsZS1wbGFjZWhvbGRlcg" \
      -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
      -d '{"event":"handoff","level":"info"}'
